PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF CONSERVATOR OF ESTATE, CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2019 - HEARING HELD. A STATUS UPDATE IS GIVEN IN OPEN COURT BY COUNSEL. THE COURT ORDERS THE ACCOUNTINGS TO BE FILED NO LATER THAN JUNE 13, 2019. A STATUS DATE ON THE FILING OF THE ACCOUNTINGS IS SET FOR JUNE 18, 2019 AT 9:00 A.M., IN DEPT. 204 (PROBATE CALENDAR). MS. MARLOWE CLARIFIES THAT THE PETITION IS REQUESTING CONSERVATORSHIP OF THE PERSON AND ESTATE OF MS. MARATAS NOT A PETITION OF THE ESTATE ONLY. THE COURT CONTINUED THE PETITION TO JUNE 27, 2019 AT 9:00 A.M., IN DEPT. 204. (*THE PETITION AS ADDED TO THE CALENDAR AS A PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A CONSERVATOR OF THE ESTATE IS NOW "CORRECTED" TO REFLECT A PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A CONSERVATOR OF THE PERSON AND ESTATE OF CONNIE M. MARATAS.) (SEE MINI-MINUTES THIS DATE FOR FULL DETAILS) -
